project_summary: Requirements draft from 7 utterances (Client, PM) with 3 functional requirements, 1 non-functional requirements, 2 constraints, and 1 open questions.

functional_requirements.text: I run a gym and need members to book classes from mobile.
Trainers should set class capacity and mark attendance.
We must use our existing Google Workspace login.

non_functional_requirements.text: Booking confirmation should arrive within a few seconds.

constraints.text: We must use our existing Google Workspace login.
Booking confirmation should arrive within a few seconds.

assumptions.text: Nice to have a leaderboard later.
Cancellation policy is not decided yet.

open_questions.text: Should members be able to cancel bookings anytime?

follow_up_questions: Should members be able to cancel bookings anytime?
